message:
fix: Update WASM host imports to match batched API (http_fetch_full, kv_multi_*, d1_batch)

The C extension was updated with batched imports (http_fetch_full replacing
http_fetch+http_response_*, kv_multi_get/put, d1_batch) but test workers
and the legacy runWasm still had the old import names, causing
WebAssembly.instantiate() to fail with "function import requires a callable".

files.patch:
@@ -95,16 +95,16 @@ async function runWasm(
       tcp_close: () => {},
       thread_spawn: () => -1,
       thread_join: () => -1,
-      http_fetch: () => -1,
-      http_response_status: () => 0,
-      http_response_read: () => 0,
-      http_response_header: () => -1,
+      http_fetch_full: () => -1,
       kv_get: () => -1,
       kv_put: () => {},
       kv_delete: () => {},
+      kv_multi_get: () => -1,
+      kv_multi_put: () => {},
       r2_get: () => -1,
       r2_put: () => {},
       d1_exec: () => -1,
+      d1_batch: () => -1,
       env_get: () => -1,
       console_log: () => {},
     };

+    d1_batch: () => -1,
     env_get: () => -1,
     thread_spawn: () => -1,
     thread_join: () => -1,
